creator: kenorb@gmail.com
text:
I'm requesting to add/update wine port for amd64
I'm not sure if this should be as separate port wine-amd64 (as other similar ports).

Already compiled binaries in package format:
http://people.freebsd.org/~ivoras/wine/

Patches:
http://drop.io/wine_fbsd64

Link to the thread:
http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=18797

What are the steps to release wine port for amd64?
